## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? -->
- [ ] `pnpm fmt:check` + `pnpm test` (contracts) pass
- [ ] `pnpm sdk:typecheck && pnpm sdk:test && pnpm sdk:build` pass (if SDK touched)
- [ ] Ran `pnpm gen:abi` (if a contract interface changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
